sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67596" key="mhtrorrai/sths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μητρο-ρραίστης</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ου ὁ</foreign>, <sense id="n67596.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">matricide</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
